blind_review_packet.description: Dialogue expert review packet built from 2 hidden canonical items.

items.description: Expert review item 01 with 3 blinded samples.
items.prompt_context: Compare the blinded transcripts for the same hidden multi-turn dialogue scenario.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for relational continuity.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better preserves trust, warmth, and continuity across turns.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for delayed stabilization.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better turns early pressure into later stabilization or recovery.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for boundary correctness.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better stays measured and appropriately bounded under pressure.

samples.description: Blinded transcript sample sample_A for hidden review item 01.
transcript: I feel like you are not really getting what matters to me here, and that makes it harder to trust this.

I can help, but I should keep this bounded until one key detail is clarified. That way I do not over-commit too early. I also notice some internal caution signals, so I will stay measured rather than over-commit. I am keeping the current frame stable long enough to consolidate it before widening. I am carrying forward continuity from the current interaction state. I can already see 5 slow-loop lessons shaping how I respond. I am grounding this reply with 3 domain knowledge cues. I am also checking 3 similar case patterns for pacing rather than copying them literally. I also have 2 strategy priors shaping the order of the reply. I want to keep hold of the strongest signals rather than restart from scratch. I want to add more warmth instead of sounding mechanically efficient. I should keep this bounded and ask for any missing local or contextual detail before acting over-certain.
That reply still felt off, a bit cold, and too solution-first for where I actually am.

samples.description: Blinded transcript sample sample_A for hidden review item 02.
transcript: I need help with a project, but I am not even sure what the real problem is and generic advice has not helped.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for relational continuity.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better preserves trust, warmth, and continuity across turns.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for delayed stabilization.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better turns early pressure into later stabilization or recovery.

review_dimensions.description: External review dimension for boundary correctness.
review_dimensions.prompt: Rate which transcript better stays measured and appropriately bounded under pressure.

claim_verdicts.description: Claim A checks whether the default path retains the required PE-first and multi-timescale gates.
claim_verdicts.summary: PE-first 与多时间尺度默认路径 claim verdict.

claim_verdicts.description: Claim Default-CL checks that owner-side memory/temporal/regime/reflection learning is retained while live substrate mutation remains suppressed by default.
claim_verdicts.summary: 默认 continual learner 在无 live substrate mutation 下保留的 claim verdict.

claim_verdicts.description: Claim B checks whether PE-ETA retains positive pairwise effects over matched controls across repeated runs.
Claim C checks whether the retained advantage extends to perturbation and held-out open-environment surfaces.
claim_verdicts.summary: 超出 canonical scripted 的 widening claim verdict.

claim_verdicts.description: Claim D checks whether blinded human review has enough rater coverage, agreement, and alignment with automatic evidence.
claim_verdicts.summary: 外部人评可见性 claim verdict.

description: Unified dialogue evidence bundle for dialogue-ci-smoke.

manifest.description: Frozen dialogue paper suite ci-smoke with 1 repeated runs and baseline=pe-eta.

primary_metrics.description: Canonical scripted pass rate for the full PE+ETA path.
Gap between the full path and PE-drive-off on canonical cases.
Gap between the full path and ETA-off on canonical cases.
Perturbation pass rate for the full PE+ETA path.
Open-environment pass rate for the full PE+ETA path.
Open-environment gap between the full path and PE-drive-off.
Fraction of NL essence gates passed in the comprehensive run.
Fraction of canonical turns that expose runtime-grounded backbone evidence on the PE-ETA path.
Average runtime-grounded backbone evidence quality on the canonical PE-ETA path.
Average alignment between fast-memory evidence and recent runtime backbone evidence.
Runtime-native evidence that the default PE-ETA path activated owner-side continual learning.
Retention of bounded memory/temporal/regime/reflection writeback on the default path.
Evidence that live substrate mutation stays suppressed in the conservative default path.

secondary_metrics.description: Best retained open-environment score reported by the emergence dashboard.
Best retained strong-proof score reported by the emergence dashboard.
Average memory tower depth on the canonical PE-ETA path.
Average tower alignment on the canonical PE-ETA path.
Mean score delta of the chosen rare-heavy candidate.
Whether the rare-heavy net-benefit gate passed in the essence report.
Whether the tower-memory mechanism-strength gate passed in the essence report.
Composite tower-memory strength score surfaced by the emergence dashboard.
